queries.question: show me information about Charlie's current physical development milestone
queries.sql: SELECT milestone_name, description FROM Physical_Milestones JOIN Child_Age ON Child_Age.physical_milestone_id = Physical_Milestones.id JOIN Children ON  Child_Age.child_id = Children.id WHERE name = 'Charlie';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?milestone_name ?description WHERE {
  ?physical_milestones a :Physical_Milestones .
  ?child_age a :Child_Age .
  ?child_age p:hasPhysical_Milestones ?physical_milestones .
  ?children a :Children .
  ?child_age p:hasChildren ?children .
  ?physical_milestones p:milestone_name ?milestone_name .
  ?physical_milestones p:description ?description .
  ?children p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = STR("Charlie"))
}

queries.question: Display a list of ids and milestone names in order of children's age lowest first
queries.sql: SELECT Physical_Milestones.id, Physical_Milestones.milestone_name FROM Physical_Milestones JOIN Child_Age ON Child_Age.physical_milestone_id = Physical_Milestones.id JOIN Children ON  Child_Age.child_id = Children.id ORDER BY Children.age DESC
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?id ?milestone_name WHERE {
  ?physical_milestones a :Physical_Milestones .
  ?child_age a :Child_Age .
  ?child_age p:hasPhysical_Milestones ?physical_milestones .
  ?children a :Children .
  ?child_age p:hasChildren ?children .
  ?physical_milestones p:id ?id .
  ?physical_milestones p:milestone_name ?milestone_name .
  ?children p:age ?age_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?age_o)

queries.question: Display a list of ids and milestone names in order of children's age lowest first
queries.sql: SELECT Physical_Milestones.id, Physical_Milestones.milestone_name, Cognitive_Milestones.id, Cognitive_Milestones.milestone_name FROM Physical_Milestones JOIN Child_Age ON Child_Age.physical_milestone_id = Physical_Milestones.id JOIN Children ON  Child_Age.child_id = Children.id JOIN Cognitive_Milestones ON Child_Age.cognitive_milestone_id = Cognitive_Milestones.id  ORDER BY Children.age DESC
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?id ?milestone_name ?id2 ?milestone_name2 WHERE {
  ?physical_milestones a :Physical_Milestones .
  ?child_age a :Child_Age .
  ?child_age p:hasPhysical_Milestones ?physical_milestones .
  ?children a :Children .
  ?child_age p:hasChildren ?children .
  ?cognitive_milestones a :Cognitive_Milestones .
  ?child_age p:hasCognitive_Milestones ?cognitive_milestones .
  ?physical_milestones p:id ?id .
  ?physical_milestones p:milestone_name ?milestone_name .
  ?cognitive_milestones p:id ?id2 .
  ?cognitive_milestones p:milestone_name ?milestone_name2 .
  ?children p:age ?age_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?age_o)

queries.question: show me information about Charlie's current physical and cognitive development milestones
queries.sql: SELECT Physical_Milestones.milestone_name, Physical_Milestones.description, Cognitive_Milestones.milestone_name, Cognitive_Milestones.description  FROM Physical_Milestones JOIN Child_Age ON Child_Age.physical_milestone_id = Physical_Milestones.id JOIN Children ON  Child_Age.child_id = Children.id JOIN Cognitive_Milestones ON Child_Age.cognitive_milestone_id = Cognitive_Milestones.id  WHERE name = 'Charlie';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?milestone_name ?description ?milestone_name2 ?description2 WHERE {
  ?physical_milestones a :Physical_Milestones .
  ?child_age a :Child_Age .
  ?child_age p:hasPhysical_Milestones ?physical_milestones .
  ?children a :Children .
  ?child_age p:hasChildren ?children .
  ?cognitive_milestones a :Cognitive_Milestones .
  ?child_age p:hasCognitive_Milestones ?cognitive_milestones .
  ?physical_milestones p:milestone_name ?milestone_name .
  ?physical_milestones p:description ?description .
  ?cognitive_milestones p:milestone_name ?milestone_name2 .
  ?cognitive_milestones p:description ?description2 .
  ?children p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = STR("Charlie"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Display information about Charlie's development milestones
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?milestone_name ?description WHERE {
  ?physical_milestones a :Physical_Milestones .
  ?child_age a :Child_Age .
  ?child_age p:hasPhysical_Milestones ?physical_milestones .
  ?children a :Children .
  ?child_age p:hasChildren ?children .
  ?physical_milestones p:milestone_name ?milestone_name .
  ?physical_milestones p:description ?description .
  ?children p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = STR("Charlie"))
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?milestone_name ?description WHERE {
  ?cognitive_milestones a :Cognitive_Milestones .
  ?child_age a :Child_Age .
  ?child_age p:hasCognitive_Milestones ?cognitive_milestones .
  ?children a :Children .
  ?child_age p:hasChildren ?children .
  ?cognitive_milestones p:milestone_name ?milestone_name .
  ?cognitive_milestones p:description ?description .
  ?children p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = STR("Charlie"))
} }
  full: { SELECT ?milestone_name ?description ?milestone_name2 ?description2 WHERE {
  ?physical_milestones a :Physical_Milestones .
  ?child_age a :Child_Age .
  ?child_age p:hasPhysical_Milestones ?physical_milestones .
  ?children a :Children .
  ?child_age p:hasChildren ?children .
  ?cognitive_milestones a :Cognitive_Milestones .
  ?child_age p:hasCognitive_Milestones ?cognitive_milestones .
  ?physical_milestones p:milestone_name ?milestone_name .
  ?physical_milestones p:description ?description .
  ?cognitive_milestones p:milestone_name ?milestone_name2 .
  ?cognitive_milestones p:description ?description2 .
  ?children p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = STR("Charlie"))
} }
}
